overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Bloodborne showing a hunter character navigating a dark gothic cathedral environment. The character moves from interior corridors through a foggy outdoor courtyard and ascends multiple grand staircases, with atmospheric lighting from wall sconces and moonlight creating a moody, horror-fantasy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: gated cathedral entrance corridor with iron bars

events.description: exits narrow stone corridor into open outdoor courtyard

agents.ego_description: hunter character walking steadily through the gated corridor toward the outdoor exit

entered.detail: tall iron gate bars framing the starting point of the corridor
ornate stone archway at the end of the corridor leading outside
dark stone walls with carved gothic details lining the narrow passage
warm orange torch sconces mounted on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow gothic corridor behind iron gates, with the hunter walking toward a distant archway. Warm torchlight illuminates the stone walls as the character approaches and exits into the outdoor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy outdoor courtyard with ancient gnarled trees

events.description: transitions from warm artificial torchlight to cool moonlit exterior
begins ascending the exterior stone staircase on the right

agents.ego_description: hunter traversing the misty courtyard, passing large twisted trees and approaching the stone stairs

entered.detail: massive twisted tree with bare branches silhouetted against the night sky
ornate stone balustrade lining the exterior staircase
wide stone staircase ascending along the cathedral facade
tall gothic architecture with pointed arches and stone buttresses

segments.scene_description: The hunter emerges into a wide, foggy courtyard surrounded by gothic ruins and massive twisted trees. The lighting shifts to cool moonlight as the character walks across the cobblestones and approaches a stone staircase ascending the building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior stone staircase with gothic balustrades leading to upper entrance

events.description: enters upper cathedral interior from the exterior staircase landing

agents.ego_description: hunter climbing the stone stairs and entering the upper level of the cathedral

entered.detail: dark stone archway marking the entrance to the upper interior
tall ornate stone columns supporting the cathedral ceiling
damaged marble floor tiles with gaps and debris scattered about

segments.scene_description: The hunter ascends the exterior stone stairs alongside the cathedral wall, then turns left to enter an upper interior hall. The space opens into a grand columned chamber with broken flooring and warm torchlight replacing the moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral hall with broken flooring and upper balconies

events.description: turns right and begins ascending interior stone staircase

agents.ego_description: hunter navigating the grand hall, turning toward and ascending the interior stairs

entered.detail: stone staircase with ornate railings leading to upper level
decorative stone arch with carved details at the top of the stairs
elevated platform with stone railings overlooking the grand hall

segments.scene_description: Inside the grand cathedral hall, the hunter walks past tall columns and broken floor tiles, then turns to ascend an interior staircase. The warm glow of wall sconces illuminates the ornate stonework as the character climbs toward the upper landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: mist-filled corridor leading to grand ascending staircase

events.description: thick fog begins filling the corridor reducing visibility
lighting becomes diffused and ethereal in the heavy mist

agents.ego_description: hunter walking up the long grand staircase enveloped in thick white fog

entered.detail: thick white fog rolling through the corridor and down the stairs
long ascending staircase with metal grate steps and ornate railings
open metal staircase allowing fog to flow through the grates
distant archway glowing with warm light at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The hunter enters a corridor filled with thick white fog and begins ascending a long grand staircase with metal grate steps. The environment becomes increasingly misty and ethereal, with diffused light creating an otherworldly atmosphere as the character climbs toward the illuminated archway above.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper cathedral corridor with lingering fog

events.description: passes through the illuminated archway into darker corridor

agents.ego_description: hunter continuing through the dark upper corridor away from the foggy stairs

entered.detail: narrow passage with dark stone walls and dim lighting
faintly visible archway at the end of the dark corridor

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the foggy staircase, the hunter passes through the illuminated archway into a darker, narrower corridor. The thick fog dissipates as the character walks deeper into the upper reaches of the cathedral, with only dim wall sconces lighting the way forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, enclosed corridors of a gothic cathedral through a moonlit exterior and back into an ethereal, fog-shrouded upper interior. It begins in a narrow stone corridor behind iron gates, moving through torchlit halls before emerging into a wide, foggy courtyard where the lighting shifts to cool moonlight amidst twisted trees and ruins. As the hunter ascends an exterior stone staircase, the scene transitions back indoors into a grand columned chamber with broken flooring, where the warm glow of wall sconces replaces the night air. The camera then follows the character through a thick, white mist onto a long grand staircase with metal grate steps, creating an otherworldly atmosphere that persists until the hunter passes through an illuminated archway. Finally, the fog dissipates as the movement leads into a darker, narrower corridor in the upper reaches of the cathedral, lit only by dim, flickering lights.
